generated_oml:
// C4: Physical sensing components and transmitted data
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real‑time speed information."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit‑converted vehicle speed data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring real‑time steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized steering angle data for DT usage."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR producing raw point‑cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDARPointCloudSensor
]
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized LiDAR point‑clouds forwarded to DT."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FeatureExtractionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelIrisDepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Iris D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D frames."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthFrameDataTransmitted
]
instance DepthFrameDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelIrisDepthCameraSensor
]
instance DepthFrameData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized depth frames for tracking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FeatureExtractionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthFrameDataTransmitted
]

// C3: Acting components
instance DriveMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage actuation delivered to the vehicle’s drive motor via the DT entity actuation FE."
]
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage actuation delivered to the steering servo via the DT entity actuation FE."
]
instance WiFiACCCommandActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote ACC commands (enable/disable, desired speed, emergency braking) sent over Wi‑Fi to the vehicle’s controller."
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes vehicle speed and steering data for monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance FeatureExtractionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering on LiDAR and depth data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ACCLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables ISO15622 ACC logic executed on the DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadServiceRemoteCommand
]
instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Allows operators to control ACC via remote commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]
instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs 3D rendering model."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores vehicle state and tracks in an external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware with DDS facilitating data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]
instance NVIDIAJetpackEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack SDK enabling GPU-accelerated processing on Jetson."
]
instance PythonPrototypingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 prototyping environment for rapid feature implementation."
]
instance CppLifecycleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ ROS2 node lifecycle management."
]
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for clustering and filtering model development."
]
instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Source control repository for code versioning."
]
instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database connectivity for data storage."
]
instance OPCUAEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC‑UA framework for data translation (optional)."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO15622 ACC control algorithm."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCLogicEnabler
]
instance ClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering combined with Kalman filtering for object tracking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FeatureExtractionEnabler
]
instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model of vehicle and surroundings."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]
instance SQLDatabaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database schema for storing vehicle state and track time‑series."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]
instance ReportingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Presentation/reporting model for UI."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]
instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Human‑readable time‑series logs of vehicle state, stored in SQL."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance TrackTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of tracked object positions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthFrameDataTransmitted
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time surveillance of ego speed, steering, tracks, and projected path."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceDashboardInsight, VehicleDynamicsDashboardInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic computation offloaded to the DT."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedOutputInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadServiceRemoteCommand : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Returns desired speed and ACC control points to vehicle controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandInsight
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator‑controlled ACC enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual representation of vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsight
]
instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates reports of vehicle state and tracks for post‑trip analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides LoadReportAction
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "3D rendering visualization insight."
]

]

    base:desc "Action to disable ACC remotely."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust desired speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Action to load and view post‑trip report."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinComponent, DigitalTwinComponent, UserEntity, CloudHostEntity
]
instance PhysicalTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity handling sensor data pre‑processing."
]
instance DigitalTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity executing ACC logic and visualization."
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator interface for remote management."
]
instance CloudHostEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud host executing data‑intensive models and reporting."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Desired speed and steering commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are converted to motor voltage and servo signals and sent via the Data Translation FE to the vehicle’s actuators; user‑initiated remote commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency brake) are transmitted from the User Entity to the vehicle over the same ROS2/DDS network."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with a required end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms from sensor data acquisition to actuation; clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all distributed components; data collection and monitoring occur at sub‑100 ms intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture instantiated as four entities; Physical Twin Entity hosts raw sensing/actuation, Digital Twin Entity hosts processing and modeling, User Entity hosts UI components, and Cross‑System Entity manages data translation; orchestrated via ROS2 topics over Wi‑Fi and internal ROS2 communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design/definition (capturing R1–R8 requirements), Development (architectural mapping to ISO 23247 and implementation in ROS2), Validation and deployment (cloud offload, latency testing), and Runtime Operation (live monitoring, remote management and data logging). The twin represents the vehicle as a manufactured, operated system with real‑time data exchange."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical latency constraint (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (≤100 ms) ensure temporal fidelity; data integrity maintained by Data Translation FE; model validity supported by SL and report generation; however, formal verification steps are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication over IEEE 802.11 Wi‑Fi using ROS 2 DDS; intra‑entity internal communication using ROS 2 topics; data serialization handled by Data Translation FE; optional use of OPC UA for data translation (not explicitly implemented)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On‑board execution on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and vehicle ECU; compute offloading performed on a cloud host (unspecified platform) to handle ACC logic; persistent data storage in an external SQL database, possibly hosted on the same cloud infrastructure."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 (Reference Architecture), ISO 15622 (ACC control), ROS 2 open standard, optional OPC UA for data translation; adherence to automotive standards via ISO 15622."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms and 100 ms clock synchronization applied; ACC control conforms to ISO 15622; no explicit cybersecurity mechanisms (e.g., encryption, authentication) are detailed in the document."
]
